blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,880 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 46°F.
Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 55°F.
